title: Nucleic Acid Purification: Bead Clean
author: Madeline Y Mayday
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ta5eig6
materials: Prepare all necessary reagents and bring to room temperature: %s %s

steps.title: Aspirate desired volume of Ampure beads...
steps.instruction: Aspirate desired volume of Ampure beads from reservoir and mix well into sample plate by mixing total volume minus one microliter less -- 20 times. Bead volumes for each bead clean are available in the High-Throughput Echo Library Prep Protocol.

steps.title: Transfer plate onto Alpaqua 384 Post...
steps.instruction: Transfer plate onto Alpaqua 384 Post Magnet Plate with 3D-printed adaptor and incubate at room temperature for another 5 minutes to allow for the formation of a magnetic pellet. alpaquamag384platform.stl It is imperative that the magnet used can elute, at the very minimum, 6uL of your chosen elution buffer. It is important to elute cDNA in as little volume as possible for a miniaturized protocol.

steps.title: Remove and discard the supernatent for the second wash step
steps.instruction: Remove and discard the supernatent for the second wash step. Allow the magnetic pellet to air dry while on the magnetic rack for a maximum of 90 seconds. Do not overdry the beads. This could cause undesired loss of cDNA.

steps.title: Aspirate 25uL freshly prepared 80% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Aspirate 25uL freshly prepared 80% ethanol from reservoir and add to samples while on the magnetic rack. Incubate at room temperature for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Remove plate from magnetic stand, and...
steps.instruction: Remove plate from magnetic stand, and resuspend beads in desired elution buffer and volume. Mix well. Volume and type of eluent are specified in the High-Throughput Echo Library Prep Protocol. Reminder: Regular elution buffer is used for Post-Second Strand Synthesis, Post- End Prep, and Post- USER/PCR bead cleans. Barcodes suspended in nuclease-free water will be used to elute in Post-Adaptor Ligation bead clean.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes. Transfer plate onto Alpaqua 384 Post Magnet Plate with adaptor with 3D-printed adaptor and incubate at room temperature for another 5 minutes.

steps.title: Slowly aspirate supernatant, now containing cDNA,...
steps.instruction: Slowly aspirate supernatant, now containing cDNA, and transfer to final PCR plate.

steps.title: Incubate samples and beads at room temperature for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate samples and beads at room temperature for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Slowly aspirate supernatant and discard
steps.instruction: Slowly aspirate supernatant and discard. Repeat the wash step for a total of 2 washes.
